ad_01.jpg.image_description: The ad features a blue gradient background with white text and two product images: one of tomatoes and one of onions. Each product image has a blue background with a white price symbol and text indicating the product name and quantity.
ad_01.jpg.visual_style: The ad uses a clean and simple design with a blue gradient background that transitions from dark to light. The use of white text and orange accents creates contrast. The overall aesthetic is modern and promotional.
ad_01.jpg.target_audience: Household shoppers looking for affordable groceries

ad_02.jpg.image_description: An image of a can of Nescafe Iced Latte on a wooden table with a brown cloth, against a blue gradient background.
ad_02.jpg.ad_copy: Nescafe Ice Latte at ₹1 just for you. Add before checkout and get your order delivered to your doorstep with Instamart. ₹1 Items on Instamart. Instamart - Get anything you need delivered to your doorstep. [Button: Order Now]
ad_02.jpg.visual_style: The ad features a brown and white can of Nescafe Iced Latte on a wooden table with a brown cloth. The background is a blue gradient. The color palette is predominantly brown, blue, and white, creating a calm and inviting mood.
ad_02.jpg.target_audience: Young adults looking for affordable and convenient food and beverage options

ad_04.jpg.image_description: The ad features a TV screen in a dark room showing a man sitting on a couch. On a wooden table in the foreground are two Kwality Wall's Cornetto Double Chocolate Dessert Cones and an Amul Cassatta Ice Cream box.
ad_04.jpg.ad_copy: DRS says yes to desserts. Ice creams & sweets delivered to your doorstep with Instamart. Delivered to your doorstep. Instamart - Get anything you need delivered to your doorstep. [Button: Order Now]
ad_04.jpg.visual_style: The aesthetic is modern and clean with a dark blue background. The color palette includes orange, white, and brown, creating a warm and inviting mood.
ad_04.jpg.emotional_appeal: Convenience - The ad appeals to the viewer's desire for easy delivery of desserts.
ad_04.jpg.target_audience: Young adults and families who enjoy desserts and value convenience

ad_05.jpg.image_description: The ad features a blue background with white text and product images of three summer coolers: Nescafe Iced Frappe, Milky Mist Greek Yogurt, and Epigamia Greek Yogurt. The products are displayed on white platforms.
ad_05.jpg.ad_copy: Grab any 1 summer cooler at ₹1. Nescafe Cafe Style Cold Coffee, Iced Frappe 170 ml ₹55 ₹1. Milky Mist Greek Yogurt Cup 100 g ₹55 ₹1. Epigamia Greek Yogurt - Natural 85 g ₹60 ₹1. Free delivery on all your orders
ad_05.jpg.visual_style: The ad has a clean and modern aesthetic with a predominantly blue and white color scheme. The use of white platforms and orange accents adds a pop of color. The overall mood is refreshing and promotional.
ad_05.jpg.target_audience: Young adults looking for affordable summer coolers

ad_06.jpg.image_description: A wicker basket filled with various fruits like bananas, apples, watermelon, grapes, and lychees, placed on a beige surface against a brown background.
ad_06.jpg.ad_copy: This is your sign to eat healthy. Get fresh fruits, delivered to your door with Instamart. Daily fresh fruits delivered. Instamart - Get anything you need delivered to your doorstep. [Button: Order Now]
ad_06.jpg.hook: This is your sign to eat healthy
ad_06.jpg.visual_style: The ad features a warm and natural aesthetic with earthy tones, predominantly brown and beige. The color palette includes shades of brown, green, red, and yellow. The overall mood is inviting and healthy.
ad_06.jpg.target_audience: Health-conscious individuals looking for convenient grocery delivery

ad_07.jpg.image_description: An advertisement featuring two types of bread on a wooden table against a blue background. The breads are in their packaging: one is a blue and red Britannia Sandwich White Bread bag and the other is an orange and white The Health Factory Zero Maida Whole Wheat Bread bag.
ad_07.jpg.ad_copy: Freshly baked breads, delivered to you!
ad_07.jpg.visual_style: The aesthetic is clean and modern with a focus on the products. The color palette includes blue, white, orange, red, and brown, creating a warm and inviting mood.
ad_07.jpg.emotional_appeal: Convenience - The ad emphasizes the delivery aspect, suggesting ease of getting freshly baked bread at home.
ad_07.jpg.target_audience: Individuals or families looking for convenient grocery shopping, likely urban dwellers with busy lifestyles.

ad_09.jpg.image_description: The ad features a blue background with a prominent orange and white InstaMart logo at the top. Below the logo, the text 'Midnight cravings? Say no more, ra.' is displayed. Three products are showcased: Lay's India's Magic Masala Chips, Thums Up Soft Drink Bottle, and Coca-Cola Diet Coke Can. Each product has its price and quantity listed.
ad_09.jpg.ad_copy: Midnight cravings? Say no more, ra. Lay's India's Magic Masala Chips ₹39 80 g, Thums Up Soft Drink Bottle ₹35 750 ml, Coca-Cola Diet Coke Can ₹35 300 ml. Insta delivered to your doorstep
ad_09.jpg.visual_style: The ad features a bold and vibrant aesthetic with a predominantly blue background, accented with orange and white. The color palette is bright and eye-catching, creating a lively mood. The products are displayed prominently with their prices and quantities.
ad_09.jpg.emotional_appeal: Convenience - The ad appeals to the viewer's need for convenience by offering late-night delivery of popular snacks and drinks.
ad_09.jpg.target_audience: Young adults and individuals who are likely to have late-night cravings for snacks and beverages.

ad_10.jpg.image_description: A plate of sliced raw mango and cucumber sprinkled with spices and salt, accompanied by a small bowl of spice on a blue surface.
ad_10.jpg.ad_copy: The OG summer snack needs no recipe. Just raw mango, cucumber, and Instamart at your door.  . Instamart - Get anything you need delivered to your doorstep. [Button: Order Now]
ad_10.jpg.visual_style: The ad features a vibrant and appetizing image with a predominantly green and orange color scheme, evoking feelings of freshness and warmth. The use of natural light and a simple wooden plate adds to the rustic yet appealing aesthetic. The overall mood is casual and inviting.
ad_10.jpg.target_audience: Young adults looking for easy and quick summer snack solutions

ad_11.jpg.image_description: A cooler filled with ice and various drink bottles and a can, set in a dimly lit living room. The drinks include a Schweppes can, a Dukes bottle, and a Bacardi mixer bottle.
ad_11.jpg.ad_copy: Party plan sorted! Get premium mixers delivered with Instamart. No rush, no hassle - just chill vibes. Instamart - Get anything you need delivered to your doorstep.

ad_11.jpg.target_audience: Young adults planning parties or social gatherings

ad_13.jpg.image_description: The image shows a close-up of a pile of yellow-orange mangoes with green leaves. One mango is highlighted with a white outline and a blue '1pc' sticker.
ad_13.jpg.ad_copy: Dil maange mango? Instamart delivers fresh, juicy mangoes straight to your doorstep. Instamart - Get anything you need delivered to your doorstep. [Button: Order Now]
